ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "home_venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the team */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the match takes place */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match took place */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  "form" TEXT /* Recent form of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is on */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_photo" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's photo */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "venue_photo" TEXT /* URL or path to a photo of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the ticket is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who bought the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number for the ticket */,
  "row_number" TEXT /* Row number for the ticket */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the venue where the ticket is located */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., League, Team) */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the sponsor is associated with (nullable) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the sponsor's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person at the sponsor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
